modules.name: controlman.const
documentation:
Constants for ControlMan.

These include paths to files and directories in the user repository.

functions.name: controlman._file_util.get_package_datafile
documentation:
Get a data file in the package's '_data' directory.

Parameters
----------
path : str
    The path of the data file relative to the package's '_data' directory.

modules.name: controlman
documentation:
ControlMan

The control center manager for RepoDynamics template repositories.

functions.name: controlman.from_json_file
documentation:
Load control center data from the full JSON file.

Parameters
----------
repo_path : str | _Path
    Path to the repository root.
filepath : str, default: controlman.const.FILEPATH_METADATA
    Relative path to the JSON file in the repository.

Raises
------
controlman.exception.ControlManFileReadError
    If the file cannot be read.

functions.name: controlman.from_json_string
documentation:
Load control center data from the full JSON string.

Parameters
----------
data : str
    JSON data string.
validate : bool, default: True
    Validate the data against the schema.

Raises
------
controlman.exception.ControlManFileReadError
    If the data cannot be read.

modules.name: controlman.data_gen.python
documentation: Standard libraries

functions.name: controlman.data_gen.main.normalize_license_filename
documentation:
Normalize a license filename.

Check whether the filename has more than one period,
and if it does, replace all but the last period with a hyphen.
This is done because GitHub doesn't recognize license files that have more than one period.

functions.name: controlman.file_gen.unit.create_environment_files
documentation:
Create pip `requirements.txt` and conda `environment.yml` files from a list of dependencies.

Parameters
----------
dependencies : list[dict]
    A list of dependencies as dictionaries with paths `pip.spec`, `conda.spec`, and `conda.channel`.
env_name : str, default: 'conda_env'
    The name of the conda environment.

Returns
-------
conda_env : str
    The contents of the `environment.yaml` conda environment file.
pip_env : str | None
    The contents of the `requirements.txt` pip requirements file,
    or `None` if no pip dependencies were found.
pip_full : bool
    Whether the pip requirements file contains all dependencies.

documentation: Verify that citation data are correct.

methods.name: controlman.data_validator.DataValidator.changelogs
documentation: Verify that changelog paths, names and sections are unique.

methods.name: controlman.data_validator.DataValidator.commits

documentation: Base class for all exceptions raised by ControlMan.

modules.name: controlman.data_helper
documentation: Helper functions to retrieve and generate data.

functions.name: controlman.data_helper.team_members_with_role_types
documentation:
Get team members with a specific role type.

Parameters
----------
role_types
    The role type(s) to filter for.
active_only
    Whether to filter for active team members only.

Returns
-------
list[dict]
    A list of dictionaries, each representing a team member.

functions.name: controlman.data_helper.team_members_with_role_ids
documentation:
Get team members with a specific role ID.

Parameters
----------
role_ids
    The role ID(s) to filter for.
active_only
    Whether to filter for active team members only.

Returns
-------
list[dict]
    A list of dictionaries, each representing a team member.

functions.name: controlman.data_helper.team_members_without_role_types
documentation:
Get team members without a specific role type.

Parameters
----------
role_types
    The role type(s) to filter out.
include_other_roles
    Whether to include team members that have roles
    other than the excluded role types.
active_only
    Whether to filter for active team members only.

Returns
-------
list[dict]
    A list of dictionaries, each representing a team member.
